title: EKDV-225
Higashiyama Show Works
description:
**Higashiyama Show**

  
Translated Works

  
Higashiyama Show is a japanese artist published under Comic LO. In a similar fashion than Onizuka Naoshi, several of his works are named after songs - though Onizuka's titles are mostly inspired by contemporary mainstream rock, and Higashiyama's are mostly inspired by Jazz.  
  
He has released 3 tankobons and 6 uncollected chapters.  
The second and third tankobons have been fully translated. Out of the first tankobon, only 1 chapter has been fully translated.  
Out of the 3 uncollected chapters, only 3 have been translated.  
  
He has also drawn the cover for the Bunkai-Kei records Elect-LO-nica Compilation album, and is currently serializing a yuri manga called Prism for Houbunsha's Tsubomi magazine.  
  
This torrent contains both the works that have and haven't been translated, separated in two appropriately named folders.  
  
![Image](http://i.imgur.com/0bP8E.jpg)  
**Stand by Me**  
http://www.mangaupdates.com/series.html?id=54352  
Published on December 2007. ISBN 978-4871829625  
http://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/product/4871829626/  
Only 1 chapter out of 9, "Cherry Pink and Apple Blossom White", has been translated.  
  
Chapter list:  
1. _Autumn Leaves_  
2. Cherry Pink and Apple Blossom White  
3. _Do What You Wanna_  
4. _Just the Two of Us_  
5. _I've Got You Under My Skin_  
6. _Speak Low_  
7. _Alright, Okay, You Win?_  
8. _Carry on Brother_  
9. _Till the Last Leaf Shall Fall_  
  
  
![Image](http://i.imgur.com/rou0f.jpg)  
**Gift**  
http://www.mangaupdates.com/series.html?id=39767  
Published on November 2008. ISBN 978-4863490406  
http://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/product/4863490402/  
8 chapters and 2 extras have been completely translated.  
  
Chapter list:  
1. Gift [\#1](http://sukebei.nyaa.se/?page=view&tid=1)  
2. Gift [\#2](http://sukebei.nyaa.se/?page=view&tid=2)  
3. Gift [\#3](http://sukebei.nyaa.se/?page=view&tid=3)  
4. Gift [\#4](http://sukebei.nyaa.se/?page=view&tid=4)  
5. Gift [\#5](http://sukebei.nyaa.se/?page=view&tid=5)  
6. Gift [\#6](http://sukebei.nyaa.se/?page=view&tid=6)  
7. Why Not?  
8. Bewitched  
  
Extra chapters:  
9. Always there  
10. We Will Meet Again  
  
  
![Image](http://i.imgur.com/heVNv.jpg)  
**Japanese Preteen Suite**  
http://www.mangaupdates.com/series.html?id=54254  
Published on March 2010. ISBN 978-4863491403  
http://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/product/4863491409/  
7 chapters and 1 extra have been translated.  
The file also contains a small 4-page special featuring the characters from Japanese Preteen Suite, that was published in Comic LO 2010.05  
  
Chapter list:  
1. The Three Question Marks  
2. Leucocyte  
3. Addiction  
4. Pooka  
5. Flim  
6. The Garden of Earthly Delights  
7. The Garden of Earthly Delights - Latter Part  
  
Extra chapter:  
8. EX: Daily Living of Japanese Preteens  
  
Included Special:  
9. Comic LO 2010.05 - Making Of  
  
  
![Image](http://i.imgur.com/7M76Z.jpg)  
**Uncollected Chapters**  
Published between May 2010 and November 2011 in Tenma Comic LO  
May 2010: http://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/product/B003A6G6J0/  
June 2010: http://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/product/B003EMEVIS/  
September 2010: http://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/product/B003U4GQBU/  
February 2011: http://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/product/B004EFC8AM/  
April 2011: http://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/product/B004L5NECG/  
November 2011: http://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/product/B005JT6E7K/  
3 out of 6 of these chapters have been translated.  
  
Chapter List:  
1. Making Of - Comic LO 2010.05 (inside the Japanese Preteen Suite file)  
2. I know you know - Comic LO 2010.06  
3. _Our Love is Here To Stay - Comic LO 2010.09_  
4. _Amapola - Comic LO 2011.02_  
5. Tiny Tina - Comic LO 2011.04  
6. _100 Hearts - Comic LO 2011.11_  
  
The November 2011 chapter (100 Hearts) also promoted a freely downloadable compilation by Bunkai-kei records. Higashiyama Show drew the album cover and a couple of images for the website.  
You can download it from: http://bunkai-kei.com/special/Elect-LO-nica/
